title: hymenocallis × festalis
intro: Hymenocallis × festalis, also known as the spider lily, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family. It is native to the southeastern United States and is known for its showy, white flowers and glossy, dark green leaves. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, and has been traditionally used to treat various health issues such as fever, colds, and skin conditions. Hymenocallis × festalis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in topical applications for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties.
